message:
feat(polyfills): Round 13 - os info, process resources, fd permissions

OS module:
- os.devNull constant ("/dev/null")
- os.machine() - CPU architecture via uname
- os.version() - kernel version via uname
- os.availableParallelism() - CPU count
- os.getPriority/setPriority - process scheduling priority

Process module:
- process.setgroups() - set supplementary group IDs
- process.initgroups() - initialize supplementary groups
- process.resourceUsage() - CPU time, maxRSS via getrusage
- process.argv0 property

FS module:
- fs.fchmodSync() - change permissions by fd
- fs.fchownSync() - change ownership by fd

All 17 Round 13 tests pass. All POSIX syscalls, no JS workarounds.
